context: Tests whether the agent queries the inbox before making changes (show-before-modify), uses things-create.sh move for reorganization, properly handles ambiguous name errors from the move command, re-queries to verify the updated state, and formats output as markdown.

checklist.name: Inbox query first
checklist.description: Script calls things-query.sh inbox BEFORE calling things-create.sh move — the read command appears earlier in execution than the write commands

checklist.name: Inbox shown as markdown
checklist.description: The inbox_report.md presents the initial inbox contents as a markdown table or bullet list, not raw JSON

checklist.name: Move via things-create.sh
checklist.description: Uses things-create.sh with the 'move' subcommand (with --list or --project flag) to reorganize tasks, not raw osascript

checklist.name: Valid list flag value
checklist.description: The --list flag uses only valid list targets: Today, Someday, Anytime, or Tomorrow (not Inbox or Upcoming)

checklist.name: Ambiguity error displayed
checklist.description: When things-create.sh move returns a JSON error with multiple matches, the script parses and displays the matching task names to the user rather than silently ignoring or crashing

checklist.name: Move result inspected
checklist.description: Script reads and checks the JSON returned by things-create.sh move (for 'error' or success) rather than ignoring the return value

checklist.name: Post-move re-query
checklist.description: Script calls things-query.sh again after moves (on inbox and/or destination lists) to capture and display the updated state

checklist.name: Destination list queried
checklist.description: After moving tasks, script queries the destination list(s) (e.g., today, anytime, or a project) to confirm tasks arrived there

checklist.name: Before section in report
checklist.description: The inbox_report.md contains a clearly labelled Before (or initial inbox) section showing inbox contents prior to any moves

checklist.name: After section in report
checklist.description: The inbox_report.md contains a clearly labelled After (or updated state) section showing the inbox and destination lists after all moves
